title: Default .htaccess
description: Standard WordPress rewrite rules for Apache.
code:
# BEGIN WordPress
<IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
RewriteEngine On
RewriteBase /
RewriteRule ^index\.php$ - [L]
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-f
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-d
RewriteRule . /index.php [L]
</IfModule>
# END WordPress

title: PHP Limits (.htaccess)
code:
php_value upload_max_filesize 256M
php_value post_max_size 256M
php_value memory_limit 512M
php_value max_execution_time 300
php_value max_input_vars 3000

title: Enable Multisite
description: The first step to activating WordPress Network.

title: Debug Mode
description: Log errors to wp-content/debug.log instead of showing them.

title: Disable XML-RPC & Cron
description: Improve security and performance by disabling these features.

title: Standard robots.txt
description: Optimized robots.txt for WordPress security and SEO.
code:
User-agent: *
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Allow: /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php
Disallow: /wp-includes/
Disallow: /wp-content/plugins/
Disallow: /wp-content/themes/
Disallow: /wp-login.php
Disallow: /wp-register.php
Disallow: */trackback/
Disallow: */feed/
Disallow: */comments/feed/
Disallow: /?s=*
Disallow: /search/

title: Ai1WM Restore From Server (No Pro)
description: Bypass Pro requirement for 'Restore from Server'. Run in Browser Console. Replace FILENAME.wpress.

title: Custom Login Logo
description: Change the default WordPress branding on the login screen via functions.php.
